title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/agent-orchestration export REPO=cursorvers/fugue-orchestrator export ISSUE_NUMBER=123 gh workflow run kernel-recovery-console.yml --repo "$REPO" -f mode=status -f canary_mode=lite -f subscription_offline_policy_override=continuity sleep 8 STATUS_RUN_ID="$(gh run list --repo "$REPO" --workflow kernel-recovery-console.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')" gh run watch --repo "$REPO" "$STATUS_RUN_ID" gh workflow run kernel-recovery-console.yml --repo "$REPO" -f mode=reroute-issue -f issue_number="$ISSUE_NUMBER" -f handoff_target=kernel -f canary_mode=lite -f subscription_offline_policy_override=continuity sleep 8 REROUTE_RUN_ID="$(gh run list --repo "$REPO" --workflow kernel-recovery-console.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')" gh run watch --repo "$REPO" "$REROUTE_RUN_ID" gh run list --repo "$REPO" --workflow fugue-task-router.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,conclusion,status,url,createdAt gh run list --repo "$REPO" --workflow fugue-tutti-caller.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId,conclusion,status,url,createdAt gh api "repos/$REPO/actions/variables/FUGUE_RECONCILE_CLAIM_STATE" --jq '.value | fromjson' gh workflow run kernel-recovery-console.yml --repo "$REPO" -f mode=mobile-progress -f canary_mode=lite -f subscription_offline_policy_override=continuity sleep 8 MOBILE_RUN_ID="$(gh run list --repo "$REPO" --workflow kernel-recovery-console.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId')" gh run watch --repo "$REPO" "$MOBILE_RUN_ID" STATUS_ISSUE="$(gh issue list --repo "$REPO" --state open --label fugue-status --limit 1 --json number --jq '.[0].number')" gh issue view "$STATUS_ISSUE" --repo "$REPO" --comments --json comments --jq '.comments[-1].body' gh issue list --repo "$REPO" --state open --label fugue-task --limit 200 --json number,labels --jq '[.[] | select((([.labels[]?.name] | index("processing")) == null) and (([.labels[]?.name] | index("completed")) == null))] | length' ```
